_comment: コマ割りパターン定義。validate-pipeline.sh と manga-page skill がこのファイルを参照する。
_readingOrder: すべて右上→左下の日本漫画読み順が前提。

patterns.name: 静の基準値
patterns.useCase: 導入ページ、後の爆発の倍率を上げる
patterns.composition: Top-right vertical narration panel (thin), center large bust shot of speaker, bottom-left small establishing shot (overhead of space)
patterns.rightToLeftFlow: top-right narration -> center bust -> bottom-left audience

patterns.name: 観客カット時計回り
patterns.useCase: 場の同調、集団のリアクション連打
patterns.composition: Top-right speaker panel with pointing gesture, then 3 reaction cuts flowing counter-clockwise from top-left to bottom-left. Tight gutters between reaction panels for time-continuity feel.
patterns.rightToLeftFlow: speaker TR -> reaction TL -> reaction CL -> reaction BL

patterns.name: 対角線5コマ構成
patterns.useCase: 阿鼻叫喚、崩壊、加速感の最大化
patterns.composition: Large top-right climax panel (40% of page), 3 tiny reaction panels aligned diagonally, large bottom-left emotional landing panel. Focus lines from top-right pull eye along diagonal.
patterns.rightToLeftFlow: explosive TR -> 3 diagonal smalls -> emotional BL

patterns.name: 指差し放射構図
patterns.useCase: 主導者が場を支配、決め台詞
patterns.composition: Central large panel of a character pointing outward, smaller reaction panels arranged radially around (top-right, top-left, bottom-left). The pointing finger extends toward the reaction panels visually.
patterns.rightToLeftFlow: center speaker -> TR reaction -> TL reaction -> BL reaction

patterns.name: メタ宣言俯瞰大ゴマ
panelSizes: large (top-left to center: bird's-eye view of space)
patterns.useCase: ピーク直前の空間定義、エピソードの引き上げ
patterns.composition: Top-right medium face panel sets the observer, then a large bird's-eye-view panel (1.5x normal font narration box) defines the entire space, followed by a small bottom-left detail panel hinting at the next action.
patterns.rightToLeftFlow: observer face TR -> bird-eye panorama -> hand/object BL

patterns.name: 全面黒ベタ+小決め台詞
panelSizes: extra-large (80% of page: full black with silhouette)
tiny (bottom-left: small cut-in of face or eye)
patterns.useCase: 覚醒、決定的瞬間の切り札（1エピ1回まで）
patterns.composition: Upper 80% of page filled with solid black, only a silhouette of the key object/figure visible, large white-outline onomatopoeia integrated into composition. Tiny bottom-left panel with close-up of eye or mouth delivering the whisper punchline.
patterns.rightToLeftFlow: massive black silhouette -> tiny whisper BL

patterns.name: 擬音構図化
panelSizes: full page or 2/3 page (with giant onomatopoeia as background element)
patterns.useCase: 音を視覚情報に変換、衝撃の聴覚化
patterns.composition: Single large panel where the onomatopoeia text is drawn as a structural background element (not just overlay) — e.g., giant 'ガラガラ' letters collapse with the scene. White-outline massive text overlapping character.

patterns.name: 後ろ姿+振り返り片目
panelSizes: large (bottom: silhouette from behind with single eye visible)
patterns.useCase: 各エピソードラスト、次ページへの引き（3〜5ページに1回上限）
patterns.composition: Top panel shows the consequence/crowd reaction. Bottom panel shows the protagonist from behind as silhouette, with just one eye glancing back over shoulder. Never reveal full face.

patterns.name: 大ゴマ上+下段3分割
patterns.useCase: シーン導入+リアクション展開
patterns.composition: Top 55% large establishing shot. Bottom row split into 3 equal panels showing close-ups / reactions / details in right-to-left order.

patterns.name: 縦長4コマ顔アップ連続
panelSizes: vertical strip lower-left (face A close-up 2nd beat)
patterns.useCase: 感情の応酬、会話の緊張、2者間ダイアローグ
patterns.composition: Four tall vertical panels arranged right-to-left in two rows (TR-TL, BR-BL) alternating two characters' faces. Each panel isolates the face at different scales — progressive zoom on key character.
patterns.rightToLeftFlow: TR face A -> TL face B -> BR face A zoomed -> BL face B reaction

patterns.name: 見開きスプラッシュ
panelSizes: full double-page spread (two B5 pages side by side)
patterns.useCase: 変身、覚醒、最大の見せ場（1話1回の切り札）
patterns.composition: Full double-page spread, single massive image. Avoid critical detail across the center gutter. Landscape aspect ratio ~10:7. Integrate the scene across both pages with natural visual flow from right to left.
patterns.rightToLeftFlow: eye enters top-right of right page, exits bottom-left of left page

patterns.name: 細長帯+大ゴマ
patterns.useCase: 時間経過+場面確定、章の始まり
patterns.composition: Top thin strip panel with date/location text or wide landscape. Large lower panel delivers the main scene with richer detail.

patterns.name: 中央大ゴマ+対面2コマ
patterns.useCase: 対決、対比構図、二項対立
patterns.composition: Top-right face of A, center large confrontation scene (or symbolic space), bottom-left face of B. Two characters face each other through the center.
patterns.rightToLeftFlow: face A TR -> center confrontation -> face B BL

patterns.name: 爆発放射型
panelSizes: full-page single panel with radial explosion composition
patterns.composition: Single full-page panel. Explosion/shockwave emanates from a focal point with radiating lines. Debris and fragments flying outward.

patterns.name: 田の字を崩す4コマ
patterns.useCase: 日常感を残しつつ変化、会話の終盤
patterns.composition: Standard 2x2 grid but the bottom-left panel is enlarged (1.5x width of bottom-right) to break symmetry and guide the eye toward the ending beat.

patterns.name: 縦長一本
patterns.useCase: 落下、上昇、垂直スケール、高層ビル、深淵
patterns.composition: Single tall panel occupying the full page height. Exaggerated vertical perspective. Foreshortening from top or bottom.
